violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by dirty dishes on the floor and linen basket. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Dishes and linen basket were moved during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Packages of imitation crab meat were observed thawing in the walk-in cooler with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood packaged in ROP shall be removed from original packaging prior to thawing to reintroduce oxygen into the food item. Food items were observed at 37 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection and were removed from packaging during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
